w:r.w:t: JWT login/refresh, org-scoped sessions, multi-tenant RBAC
Custom roles, permission catalog, safe role deletion with 409 guard
Email invites, role assignment, user deletion with cascade
Multi-org setup, profiles, org session limits
Full candidate profile create, read, update, delete
LLM-powered extraction of skills, experience, education from uploaded resumes
Candidate↔job matching scores with skill gap analysis and confidence ratings
Email + normalised phone matching; merge reassigns pipeline, interviews, sourcing records
Free-text interaction notes per candidate with timestamp
Full outcome tracking across all pipeline stages
Create/edit jobs with salary, skills, location, type, status
LLM-generated JD from job title and context
Draft → Active → Filled → Closed with audit history
Structured skill requirements linked to jobs for ATS matching
Drag-and-drop stage progression: Applied → AI Screening → Interview → Offer → Hired
Combined kanban/table with search and filtering
Full audit trail of every stage transition with timestamps
Automated emails to candidates on pipeline stage changes via Brevo SMTP
Funnel metrics, stage duration, conversion rates, CSV export
Recruiter summary: open jobs, active candidates, placements, recent activity
Create, send, accept, reject, expire offers with salary/currency/start date
Candidate moves to Offer stage with linked offer record
Structured interviews with participants, type, and meeting provider
Groq-generated post-interview summary from live transcript
Real-time question suggestions and transcript via AssemblyAI during interviews
Automated reminder notifications for interviewers and candidates
Embedded video meeting rooms with token authentication
Role-specific interview question generation per job
Recruiter configures and sends secure-token invite link via branded email
Permission check, preview, and device status before interview starts
Streaming STT with session_began gate; browser SpeechRecognition fallback
_aiSpeaking flag prevents TTS echo from being transcribed as candidate speech
Recruiter sets max_questions; Groq generates contextual follow-ups
Always-asked at end: notice period, compensation expectations, candidate questions
AI responds to candidate questions using job description context (2-round max)
Communication, Experience, Leadership, Confidence, Culture Fit, Overall (0–100)
≥80% questions answered + ≥200 words required; short duration = reduced confidence warning
strong_hire / hire / consider / reject with strengths and concerns
Interview completes → review_pending; candidate never auto-advances
Advance to Interview / Hold / Reject – only then pipeline moves
Shows only 'Interview submitted successfully' – no scores, no recordings
Scores, transcripts, recordings gated to recruiters/admins only
MediaRecorder WebM uploaded to Supabase Storage on interview completion
Timing data (question_start / answer_start / answer_end) stored in DB
Recordings bucket with signed URL generation (1-hour TTL)
Branded HTML email with job title, duration, expiry, Start Interview button
All dimension scores with bar charts, recommendation badge
AI-generated strengths/concerns each backed by transcript evidence
Chat-bubble view of complete AI↔candidate conversation
Notice period, compensation expectations, candidate questions displayed separately
Collapsible video + audio player with signed URL (recruiter only)
Advance / Hold / Reject buttons with free-text recruiter notes field
Query-based candidate discovery with scoring and deduplication
Review candidates, import selected profiles directly into pipeline
Invites, stage changes, AI screening invites, offer notifications
Vendor job submissions with read-own scoped access
Client-scoped recruiter assignment and job access
Metadata stored; clips not yet split from full recording. Timing data exists for server-side extraction.
Interview reminders in DB; no Google Calendar / Outlook link generation yet.
Job management complete internally; no public-facing /jobs page for candidates to apply.
Offer model and stage exist; no PDF template rendering or e-signature flow.
400 root cause fixed (base64 stripped from form field); end-to-end confirmation pending.
Three prioritised phases define the product roadmap based on current platform maturity and recruiter demand.
Server-side FFmpeg splitting of interview.webm using stored timestamps into q1.webm, q2.webm, etc.
SEO-friendly /jobs page listing open roles with Apply Now button
Candidates submit resume and track their application status without a full account
Send calendar invites from interview scheduling; two-way sync
PDF template rendering with DocuSign / HelloSign integration
When candidate applies, AI screening invite sent automatically based on job config
AI ranks top N candidates per job based on screening score + ATS score combined
External hiring managers review shortlisted candidates and approve to interview
Bulk stage move, bulk email, bulk reject for pipeline management
'New AI screening complete', 'Candidate advanced' alerts to recruiter channels
Export hired candidates to BambooHR / Workday / SAP on placement
Import candidate profiles from LinkedIn URLs into AIRIS
Corporate single sign-on for enterprise clients
Auto-delete candidate data after configurable retention period
Diversity metrics, source-of-hire ROI, time-to-hire, PDF/Excel export
Non-English interview support for global hiring
Feature is built, tested, and deployed.
Core feature exists; some sub-features or integration steps remain.
Root cause identified and fix merged; end-to-end verification pending.
Near-term priority — recording completeness and candidate experience.
